title: Sultan Optimized
body:
⚔️ PvP & Performance — Optimized for Victory

This modpack is built for players who want the smoothest, most responsive Minecraft experience possible.
Using Vulkan-based rendering for maximum performance, every frame counts — perfect for competitive PvP battles.

✨ Features:

Ultra-fast performance with Vulkan rendering for higher FPS and lower latency.

PvP-ready tweaks for smoother hit detection and reaction time.

Lightweight & optimized — minimal bloat, maximum speed.

Perfect for servers, duels, or any competitive setting.

Whether you’re strafing in a duel or chasing that final hit, this pack makes sure your PC keeps up with your skills.

If you want, I can also make you a shorter “tagline” version for the Modrinth search preview so it stands out more. That way people see the PvP + performance focus instantly.**_~~

> 1. - ****
